query:
SELECT 
  id, name, address, neighborhood, region, phone, instagram, hours 
FROM establishments 
WHERE address IS NOT NULL AND phone IS NOT NULL AND hours IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT 
  id, name, address, neighborhood, region, phone, instagram, hours 
FROM establishments 
WHERE address IS NOT NULL AND phone IS NOT NULL AND hours IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 10;
